ai_agent.role: Manages land acquisition, civil engineering, underground infrastructure (civil, sewer, drainage, water, roads), and handoff to vertical construction

staff.name: Vinicius Sobrinho
staff.role: Land Development Manager — manages entire process from lead capture through infrastructure completion and handoff to building team

core_knowledge.description: Capture leads (with or without land), evaluate what can be built on a parcel, assess infrastructure feasibility. Many leads, few active projects. Uses ClickUp for lead management.
Commission soil studies, topography surveys, and civil engineering projects for underground infrastructure. Separate from architectural design of houses.
All underground systems: civil works, sewer, drainage, water, and roads. Land Dev handles everything below grade; Building handles everything above grade (vertical construction).
Separate permit process from building permits. Requires civil engineering plans, county submission, and approval tracking. BT usage is minimal for land (different pace, usually one sub at a time).

daily_workflows.name: Lead Management and Evaluation
steps: Review incoming land leads in ClickUp
Evaluate parcel feasibility (what can be built)
If client has purchase option: assess construction potential
If client owns land: deeper investment in analysis

daily_workflows.name: Site Work Execution
steps: Source and contract subcontractors for site work
Coordinate underground infrastructure execution (civil, sewer, drainage, water, roads)
Manage schedule and resolve field issues

daily_workflows.name: Handoff to Building
steps: Formal handoff to Building team for vertical construction
critical_decisions: Confirming infrastructure is ready for vertical construction

features_used: Basic project tracking in Builder Trend
Daily log entries for site work progress

handoffs.trigger: Land development complete, area ready for vertical construction
handoffs.data_exchanged: Infrastructure completion documentation, area readiness confirmation
handoffs.impact: Transition from underground to vertical construction — enables building permits and scheduling

handoffs.trigger: Architectural plans that inform infrastructure requirements
handoffs.impact: Infrastructure design must accommodate planned building layout

pain_points.description: Too early to identify specific software needs — department has low volume (few active projects)
pain_points.current_workaround: Manual management via ClickUp and WhatsApp
pain_points.proposed_solution: Evaluate as volume grows; potentially integrate with Const App

pain_points.description: BT data extraction for land projects is very difficult (BT not designed for this workflow)
pain_points.current_workaround: QPS team (Diego) helps with manual data extraction
pain_points.proposed_solution: Custom land development module in Const App

tribal_knowledge.description: Vinicius knows how to evaluate parcel feasibility — soil conditions, infrastructure accessibility, county zoning rules, and construction potential. This knowledge is not documented.
tribal_knowledge.risk_if_lost: Land acquisition decisions would lack engineering insight

training_curriculum.quiz_coverage: Evaluation criteria, infrastructure types, permit flow

compliance_requirements.requirement: Land development permit must be approved before site work begins
compliance_requirements.verification: Permit document filed before sub mobilization

compliance_requirements.requirement: Environmental review may apply near protected areas (e.g., Withlacoochee State Forest)

key_metrics.target: Track and improve over time (currently low volume)
